Describe the specific ingredients added to the mixer bowl and the actions performed between 10 and 18 seconds.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a hand pours cubed unsalted butter into the metal bowl; at 12s, light brown sugar is displayed via text overlay while butter is scraped; at 16s, white granulated sugar is poured from a glass bowl into the mixer; finally, the mixer head is lowered into the bowl at 17s.

question: Outline the visual setup and text overlays presented during the introduction and initial ingredient addition phases.
canonical_answer: At 2s, three red mixers stand behind piles of baked cookies with title text; at 10s, text overlay specifies unsalted butter as 225 g while pouring; at 12s, light brown sugar is labeled as 220 g packed; at 16s, white sugar is added without specific text measurement visible.

question: What is about to happen? A. The person will pour the flour into the mixer bowl. B. The person will add the dark brown chunks to the bowl. C. The person will pour granulated sugar into the mixer. D. The person will remove the mixing bowl from the stand.
